FIXES_IMPLEMENTED.title: Warehouse-level HPP in product_stocks
FIXES_IMPLEMENTED.change: Added unit_cost and total_value fields to ProductStock model

FIXES_IMPLEMENTED.title: Weighted Average HPP calculation on purchase
FIXES_IMPLEMENTED.change: Implemented formula: new_hpp = (old_qty * old_hpp + new_qty * new_price) / total_qty

FIXES_IMPLEMENTED.title: Sales COGS from warehouse HPP
FIXES_IMPLEMENTED.change: Sales now fetches HPP from product_stocks.unit_cost instead of products.cost_price

FIXES_IMPLEMENTED.title: Data importer for iPOS to OCB TITAN
FIXES_IMPLEMENTED.change: Created IPOSDataImporter with idempotent import for all master data
FIXES_IMPLEMENTED.validation: Import successful - 382 accounts, 110 products, 658 stock positions

stock_quantities.reason: iPOS has 48M units, TITAN has 69M units (includes existing data)
stock_quantities.action: Expected - TITAN has additional test data

stock_valuation.notes: Both systems show 0 because staged HPP was 0

sales_totals.reason: Sales data not yet imported (focus on master data first)

journal_balance.reason: iPOS journal was already UNBALANCED in backup (Rp 2,246,550 difference)
journal_balance.action: CRITICAL - iPOS source data has accounting issue

ipos_journal_unbalanced.impact: Cannot trust iPOS journal data without correction
ipos_journal_unbalanced.recommendation:
1. Identify corrupt journal entries in iPOS
2. Create adjustment journal entry
3. Or accept known difference

FLOW_ALIGNMENT_STATUS.accounting_flow: PARTIAL (account codes configured, journal validation needed)
